name: NAIL-PATELLA SYNDROME
definition: FONG DISEASE = ILIAC HORNS = FAMILIAL / HEREDITARY OSTEO- rare autosomal-dominant disorder characterized by symmetrical meso- and ectodermal

demographics.Genetics: mutation of LMX1B gene encoding a transcription factor important to development of

distribution: flared iliac crest with protuberant anterior iliac spines
discriminating_features: radial head / capitellum hypoplasia with subluxation / dislocation of radial head

general: radial head / capitellum hypoplasia with subluxation / dislocation of radial head
flared iliac crest with protuberant anterior iliac spines
flexion contractures of hip, knee, elbow, fingers, foot with inability of full extension
Knee: genu valgum ← asymmetrical development of femoral condyles

clinical.Cx: knee joint instability, restriction, pain, arthritis
